facebook.caption:
Fresh seafood on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo for $15-30 a person. That's it. That's the post.

Aloha Beach Bar pulls 4.7 stars across 2,072 reviews and the prices still haven't caught up to the hype. Grilled fish, cold drinks, beach bar atmosphere. Nothing overcomplicated.

If you're staying anywhere near the main strip, this one is walking distance. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: 2,072 people rated this place 4.7 stars. The bill still comes in under $30. Watch what you get at Aloha Beach Bar on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo before the crowds figure it out.
